error_signature: Bad Request: bad webhook: An HTTPS URL must be provided for webhook
title: Telegram webhook requires HTTPS URL
symptom: When trying to set up a Telegram webhook, n8n throws a 'Bad Request: bad webhook' error indicating that an HTTPS URL is required.
root_cause: Telegram requires that all webhook URLs be served over HTTPS for security reasons. If the provided URL is HTTP, Telegram will reject the request, resulting in the error message.
fix_steps: Set up a secure HTTPS tunnel using a service like NGROK
Update the webhook URL in the Telegram Trigger node to the new HTTPS URL provided by NGROK
Save the workflow and test the Telegram Trigger again
agent_instruction: Use NGROK to create an HTTPS tunnel and update the webhook URL in the Telegram Trigger node.
